case_title: HOWARD GEORGE ATKINS VS. UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2023 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-15-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-15-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY. PLAINTIFF HOWARD GEORGE ATKINS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DES GALLAGHER, ASSOCIATE DEAN FOR CLINICAL SERVICES. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATKINS, HOWARD GEORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,090.00, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION. MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Howard George Atkins Plaintiff/Respondent in pro per
Dr. Des Gallagher as representative for Defendant/Appellant, University of the Pacific
All parties are sworn.

Howard George Atkins Plaintiff/Respondent in pro per requests a continuance.
Dr. Gallagher responds.

The Court and counsel discuss details of the request.
Howard George Atkins Plaintiff/Respondent in pro per presents Exhibit 1: Payment Demand-3 pages.

The Court GRANTS Plaintiffs request for continuance. Exhibit 1 is retained in the file. Matter is continued to January 11, 2024, at 9:30am.
